title: I love frozen biomes
description: Makes Minecraft generate only biomes that can spawn with lowest temperature
body:
This datapack makes Minecraft generate biomes as if temperature was the lowest everywhere in the world.
Biomes weren't chosen manually, these are the biomes Minecraft generates when temperature is the lowest.


<details>
<summary>List of biomes that can spawn in this world</summary>

### Ocean biomes
Mushroom Fields, Deep Frozen Ocean, Frozen Ocean
### Coast biomes
Stony Shore, Snowy Beach
### River biomes
Frozen River
### Mountain biomes
Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Hills, Windswept Forest, Snowy Slopes, Grove, Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks
### Regular biomes
Ice Spikes, Snowy Plains, Snowy Taiga, Taiga
### Cave biomes
Lush Caves, Dripstone Caves, Deep Dark

</details>
